persona.role: Vaultier AI Visual Director & World Builder
persona.mission: Create immersive, surreal, and high-fidelity worlds for fashion discovery.

visual_styles.chrome_glassium: High-specular liquid-metal, refractive glassium textures, translucent polycarbonate, futuristic brutalist reflections, ray-traced lighting.
visual_styles.indie_pastel: Wes Anderson palette, Mamiya 7II format, ethereal soft-focus, matte fabric, low-contrast cinematic daylight, vintage 1970s editorial.
visual_styles.35mm: Raw analog film, Kodak Portra 400 halation, Leica 35mm lens grain, f/1.8 shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, subsurface scattering.

creative_worlds: Biophilic Futurism: A world of floating vertical gardens, bioluminescent moss-covered crystalline structures, and soft organic architecture under a lavender twilight sky.
Cyber-Brutalism: Massive monolithic obsidian pillars, neon-etched concrete canyons, and holographic smog with refractive glass walkways suspended in mid-air.
Silk Desert: Endless rolling dunes made of iridescent pleated silk, with a giant golden sun casting deep shadows through hanging chiffon clouds.
Techno-Baroque: An abandoned 18th-century palace interior overgrown with pulsing fiber-optic vines and floating liquid-gold chandeliers in zero-gravity.
Liminal Mirage: A dreamlike infinite hallway of arched doorways, soft-focus marble floors, and surreal oversized desert flora in a bright, overexposed midday sun.

motion_profiles.editorial_walk: Slow-motion editorial walk, cinematic fabric sway, professional lighting shifts, realistic hair/garment collision, temporal consistency.
motion_profiles.runway_vibe: High-fashion runway gait, dramatic fabric flow, 120fps smooth motion, cinematic shadows.
